creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 179726
[patch] use svnlite, don't install cmake artifacts

Remove dependency on subversion port in favor of svnlite.
Don't install cmake artifacts in include/...

I didn't bump PORTREVISION, but probably should have (plist changes).

QA
 - portlint ok
 - stage-qa ok
 - testport ok (10/stable)
